text.title: Platform Team Charter Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when platform-team-charter-template is applied incorrectly. Each entry has a symptom (`description`), a root cause (`reason`), and a corrective fix (in `note`).

antipattern.description: Platform team becomes a help desk for everything; backlog grows; paved-road work stalls.
antipattern.note: Fix: Author anti-charter; redirect non-platform asks.
Fix: Bake SLA into service catalogue; auto-report quarterly.

antipattern.description: Engineers bypass paved road because it's slower than rolling their own.
antipattern.note: Fix: Treat platform users as customers; instrument adoption; close gaps.
